use_cases: Displaying FAQ sections with expandable answers on documentation and help pages
Organizing settings panels with collapsible option groups
Creating hierarchical navigation menus with expandable categories
Building content sections that reveal detailed information on demand
Implementing step-by-step guides with collapsible instructional steps
ai_summary: A lightweight accordion component built on @ark-ui/react featuring glass-morphism styling with gradient backgrounds and backdrop blur effects. The component uses smooth CSS transitions for chevron rotation and subtle hover color shifts, supporting collapsible behavior for displaying hierarchical content like FAQs, settings, or navigation menus.
